name: 狂信者献祭
description: 飞段对自身造成10点真实伤害；若血誓诅咒激活，诅咒目标同时受到10点真实伤害
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var result = dealDamage(caster, caster, 10, 'true', context.battle, context.skill.id); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '发动狂信者献祭，对自身造成' + result.damage + '点真实伤害' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对自身造成10点真实伤害；若血誓激活则诅咒目标同时受到10点真实伤害', expectedValues: { selfDamage: 10 } }; }
